movie.actors: Zach Galifianakis, Kristen Wiig, Owen Wilson, Ross Kimball
movie.plot: A guard at an armored car company in the Southern U.S. organizes one of the biggest bank heists in American history. Based on the October 1997 Loomis Fargo robbery.
movie.title: Masterminds
movie.writer: Chris Bowman (screenplay), Hubbel Palmer (screenplay), Emily Spivey (screenplay), Emily Spivey (story), Chris Bowman (story), Hubbel Palmer (story)
